metadata.description: Interview transcription that measures narrative gravity — dual-engine verified transcripts, panel diarization, gravity-coded moments with frame evidence.

plugins.name: gravitas
plugins.description: Ingest a social-science interview (or a folder) into a dual-engine verified, speaker-diarized transcript with narrative-gravity flags — a .docx with anchored comments plus a JSON sidecar. Bundles the upstream /watch video skill unchanged.
